modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to sync email on mobile after Duo Mobile setup

full_description_text:  
After configuring Duo Multi-Factor Authentication, my email stopped syncing on my smartphone. The Duo Mobile app prompts for my password repeatedly, and my email on the computer is not updating either. I can't access my emails on my phone, as it doesn't recognize my password.
short_description: Unable to sync email on mobile after Duo Mobile setup
description: After configuring Duo Multi-Factor Authentication, my email stopped syncing on my smartphone. The Duo Mobile app prompts for my password repeatedly, and my email on the computer is not updating either. I can't access my emails on my phone, as it doesn't recognize my password.
